            Data = __DwarfMapDict_51dc3eb6(a.Data),

    private global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int> __DwarfMapDict_51dc3eb6(global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int>? src)
    {
        if (src is null) return new global::System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, int>();
